_publications._publicationTitle: Autism Spectrum Disorder Symptom Profile Across the RASopathies.

resourceName: Conners Parent Rating Scale (3rd edition, short form)
details: Mean inattention scores were 75.7 (95% CI: 75.2-76.2) in NF1+ASD, 73.1 (95% CI: 71.2-75.0) in NS+ASD, and 80.7 (95% CI: 78.5-82.9) in CFC+ASD (p=0.460)
